message:
Add read_lance() function for SQL-based data loading

- Add read_lance('url') function to FROM clause like DuckDB
- Support both read_lance('url') and 'url.lance' syntax
- SQL query now self-contains data source, no separate file loading needed
- Parser recognizes table functions and string literals in FROM clause
- Default query: SELECT * FROM read_lance('https://...') LIMIT 50
- Remove old sample .lance files (data served from R2)
